g.onclick: sendPrompt('Patient portal pages P4: /doctors, /articles, /faqs — Next.js ISR pages fetching Strapi directly, no auth required')
sendPrompt('Patient portal protected pages P4: /my-records, /appointments, /uploads — requires JWT, fetches NestJS API')
sendPrompt('Strapi CMS P4: separate Node.js service on :1337, own SQLite/Postgres DB, content types: Article, FAQ, ConsentForm, DoctorProfile')
sendPrompt('NestJS API P4: two new modules — MedicalRecordsModule and PatientFilesModule — both new, all P1+P2+P3 inherited')
sendPrompt('Strapi DB: should use separate Postgres schema or SQLite for simplicity in P4? Tradeoffs for production')
sendPrompt('PostgreSQL P4: 3 new tables — medical_records, patient_files, strapi_doctor_sync — migration details')
sendPrompt('S3 file storage P4: patient file uploads, medical record PDFs, file size limits, virus scan considerations')
sendPrompt('Article content type: title, slug, body (rich text), author (relation to DoctorProfile), category, published_at, SEO fields')
sendPrompt('FAQ content type: question, answer (rich text), category enum, order field for sorting, is_published')
sendPrompt('ConsentForm content type: title, version, body (rich text), effective_date — patient must accept before first booking')
sendPrompt('DoctorProfile content type: doctorId (FK to NestJS), bio, photo (Strapi media), specialties, languages — public-facing only')

svg.text: Color = data origin: teal = Strapi public · purple = NestJS protected · amber = CMS service
